title: Partner Intake
description: Raw or normalized partner intake data from Tally, manual entry, GPT review, CRM import, or spreadsheet import.

phone.description: Primary contact phone number when provided.

company.description: Company, agency, brand, or organization name.

website.description: Website, landing page, LinkedIn profile, or public brand URL.

partner_type_claimed.description: The partner type claimed by the submitter before internal classification.

audience.description: Who the partner reaches or serves.

industry.description: Main business niche, vertical, or industry served.

funding_experience.description: Funding, referral, broker, finance, or business-credit related experience.

current_tools.description: Tools already used, such as CRM, email platform, automations, Notion, HubSpot, Sheets, or n8n.

traffic_or_network_size.description: Claimed audience size, community reach, list size, CRM size, client book, or deal flow source.

referral_volume_estimate.description: Estimated number of relevant funding referrals or partner opportunities per month.

desired_partner_role.description: How the submitter wants to partner: affiliate, referral, broker, COI, strategic, vendor, or other.

notes.description: Free-form notes from Tally, admin, GPT, CRM, or import source.

submitted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when intake was submitted or imported.

examples.audience: Service businesses, contractors, and local operators that need cash flow planning before tax deadlines.
examples.funding_experience: Refers clients to banks occasionally but wants a clearer funding readiness workflow.
examples.traffic_or_network_size: About 140 active client relationships and a 2,800-person email list.
examples.desired_partner_role: Referral partner with educational resources and a simple handoff process.
examples.notes: Wants safe language and does not want to make funding promises to clients.
